basic_info.name_zh: 大韩赤十字社（大韩红十字会）
basic_info.name_en: Republic of Korea National Red Cross

key_people.name: Vacant (32nd President)
key_people.title: President (회장)
key_people.title_description: Chief executive of the Korean Red Cross, elected by the Central Committee and appointed with presidential approval. 3-year term.
key_people.description: The 31st President Kim Chul-soo resigned on 2025-11-07 over racist remarks controversy. The 32nd President has not yet been appointed as of May 2026.

key_people.name: Lee Jae-myung
key_people.title: Honorary President (명예회장)
key_people.title_description: By law (Article 14 of the Korean Red Cross Organization Act), the sitting President of South Korea serves as Honorary President.
key_people.description: Current President of South Korea; serves ex officio.

departments.name: Planning & Coordination Office (기획조정실)
departments.description: Strategic planning, budgeting, organizational coordination, and legal affairs

departments.name: Fundraising Strategy Headquarters (모금전략본부)
departments.description: National fundraising campaigns, donor management, and corporate partnerships

departments.name: Domestic Operations Headquarters (국내사업본부)
departments.description: Domestic disaster relief, community welfare, volunteer services, first aid training, and youth Red Cross programs

departments.name: International Operations Headquarters (국제사업본부)
departments.description: International humanitarian aid, overseas disaster relief, inter-Korean Red Cross dialogue, and separated family reunions

departments.name: Blood Management Headquarters (혈액관리본부)
departments.description: National blood donation campaigns, blood bank operations, blood safety testing, and blood supply management across 15 blood centers nationwide

departments.name: Talent Development Institute (인재개발원)
departments.description: Staff training, leadership development, and organizational capacity building

departments.name: Atomic Bomb Victims & Sakhalin Koreans Support HQ (원폭피해자사할린동포지원본부)
departments.description: Support for Korean atomic bomb survivors and Sakhalin Korean returnees

departments.name: Audit Office (감사실)
departments.description: Internal audit and compliance oversight, reporting to the President

recent_events.title: President Kim Chul-soo resigns over racist remarks controversy
recent_events.description: Kim Chul-soo (31st President) tendered his resignation after President Lee Jae-myung ordered a government investigation into reports that Kim made racist remarks about foreign ambassadors at a 2023 gala event. Kim reportedly said 'only the dark-skinned people' were present at the event. The Ministry of Health and Welfare subsequently issued an institutional warning to the Korean Red Cross for its inadequate response.
recent_events.impact: Leadership vacuum; 32nd President appointment pending. Institutional warning from supervisory ministry.

recent_events.title: Health Ministry issues official warning to Korean Red Cross
recent_events.description: The Ministry of Health and Welfare issued an institutional warning to the Korean Red Cross for failing to properly address former President Kim Chul-soo's racist remarks. The disciplinary action cited the organization's inadequate response to the incident.
recent_events.impact: Formal disciplinary record against the institution.

recent_events.title: 120th Anniversary Commemoration Ceremony
recent_events.description: The Korean Red Cross held a ceremony at COEX in Seoul's Gangnam district to commemorate the 120th anniversary of its founding. President Kim Chul-soo delivered a commemorative address.

recent_events.title: 2024 fiscal year closes with 9,444 billion KRW revenue
recent_events.description: The 2024 accounting settlement showed total revenue of 944.4 billion KRW and total expenditure of 946.0 billion KRW, resulting in a fiscal year deficit of 1.6 billion KRW. Major accounts include blood services (404.7B KRW), general operations (211.7B KRW), and hospital operations (169.6B KRW).
recent_events.impact: Stable financial position with near-balanced budget.

recent_events.title: Kim Chul-soo inaugurated as 31st President
recent_events.description: Kim Chul-soo, former chairman of President Yoon Suk-yeol's supporters' association, was inaugurated as the 31st President of the Korean Red Cross. He succeeded Shin Hee-young (30th President, 2020-2023), a Seoul National University medical professor.
recent_events.impact: Leadership transition from Moon administration appointee to Yoon administration appointee.

related_entities.org_description: Supervisory ministry overseeing the Korean Red Cross as a designated public institution

related_entities.org_name: International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies (IFRC)
related_entities.org_description: Global federation of 191 national Red Cross/Red Crescent societies

related_entities.org_name: International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC)
related_entities.org_description: International humanitarian organization based in Geneva, maintains a mission in Seoul since 2015
Korean government ministry responsible for inter-Korean affairs; Red Cross handles inter-Korean dialogue channel

related_entities.org_name: Red Cross Society of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea
related_entities.org_description: North Korean counterpart Red Cross society; counterpart in inter-Korean Red Cross talks and separated family reunions
Korean government aid agency for international development cooperation

core_business: 大韩赤十字社（Korean Red Cross）是韩国依据《大韩赤十字社组织法》设立的特殊法人，隶属于保健福祉部，是国际红十字与红新月运动在韩国的执行机构。该组织成立于1905年10月27日，由朝鲜高宗皇帝颁布敕令创立，是世界上历史最悠久的红十字会之一。核心业务涵盖：全国血液事业（运营15个血液院、131个献血中心，主导韩国献血及血液供给体系）；灾害救援（自然灾害、火灾等重大灾难的紧急救助）；医疗服务（运营5家医院、移动诊疗所、急救医疗信息中心）；国际人道主义援助（海外灾害救助、难民支援）；南北红十字会谈及离散家属重逢事业；原子弹受害者及库页岛韩人支援；急救培训、水上安全、山地安全等安全教育；青少年红十字活动；志愿者组织运营与社区服务。2024年度收入约9,444亿韩元，支出约9,460亿韩元，员工约3,977人。总部位于江原特别自治道原州市革新路50号，首尔中区设有首尔事务所，全国设有16个道广域市分社。
apec_stance: 作为国际红十字运动的成员组织，大韩赤十字社不直接参与APEC政策制定，但在APEC框架内的人道主义合作、灾害管理、公共卫生应急响应等领域可作为执行伙伴发挥作用。韩国是ICRC捐助方支持小组（DSG）成员，2023年向ICRC总部及一线行动捐助超过1,050万瑞士法郎。

collection_meta.notes: Enriched from phase 2 skeleton. Key data: 2024 financials from official webzine, leadership crisis (Kim Chul-soo resignation Nov 2025), organizational structure from Korean Wikipedia. 32nd President not yet appointed as of May 2026.
